_notes.purpose: Example hedge spec for mode='supplied' (Iteration 3, Problem A). The caller passes swap_now_fixed and swap_later_fixed (and the SOFR path) directly in the POST /run body; the composer uses those values verbatim with no derivation.
_notes.fixed_rate_params_role: The two rates listed below are REFERENCE values only — pinned to the V2-locked numbers for byte-equality with the India-US-textiles derived run. At runtime, the composer reads the rates from state['supplied'] (populated by the request body); fixed_rate_params on this file is consulted ONLY as a fallback when no supplied block is present in the state, in which case the composer raises rather than silently using them. The presence here documents the canonical shape for a supplied-rule hedge spec.
_notes.request_shape: POST /run accepts {prompt, loan_doc, supplied: {sofr_path: number[], swap_now_fixed: number, swap_later_fixed: number}}
_notes.v1_match: swap_now_fixed=0.0502 and swap_later_fixed=0.0585 match the V2-locked numbers from the india-us-textiles derived path (see PROJECT_CONTEXT.md — V2 NUMBERS LOCKED).
